## Properties

| Property          | Attribute          | Description                                                    | Type                                   | Default     |
| ----------------- | ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- | ----------- |
| `alt`             | `alt`              | Alternative text for image.                                    | `string`                               | `undefined` |
| `backgroundColor` | `background-color` | Background color for initials (CSS color value or color name). | `string`                               | `undefined` |
| `firstName`       | `first-name`       | First name of the person (used for initials fallback).         | `string`                               | `undefined` |
| `lastName`        | `last-name`        | Last name of the person (used for initials fallback).          | `string`                               | `undefined` |
| `shapeVariant`    | `shape-variant`    | Avatar shape variant.                                          | `"circle" \| "square"`                 | `'circle'`  |
| `size`            | `size`             | Avatar size.                                                   | `"lg" \| "md" \| "sm" \| "xl" \| "xs"` | `'md'`      |
| `src`             | `src`              | Avatar image source URL.                                       | `string`                               | `undefined` |
